name: Explorer Shell Bags — Icon Positions (ItemPos)
categoryDescription: Registry artifacts that span multiple categories or serve specialized investigative purposes.
description: Desktop and shell folder icon positions stored in Shell Bags. Unlike the full BagMRU which tracks folder navigation, ItemPos specifically records icon layout on the Desktop and in folder views.
forensic_value: Desktop icon layout at a specific timestamp — low individual forensic value but corroborates that the system was used interactively. Combine with full ShellBags BagMRU for complete folder navigation picture.
